items.stem: a. Amy wants to build a cube with 3 cm sides using 1 cm cubes. How many cubes does she need? b. How many 1 cm cubes would she need to build a cube with 6 cm sides?
items.workedSolution: a. Each single layer of cubes contains 3 × 3 = 9 cubes. There are 3 layers, so Amy needs 3 × 9 = 27 one cm cubes in all. Or, a shorter way: Amy needs 3 × 3 × 3 = 27 one cm cubes. b. Now each single layer of cubes contains 6 × 6 = 36 cubes. There are 6 layers, so Amy needs 6 × 36 = 216 one cm cubes in all. As before, we can simply compute 6 × 6 × 6 to get the number of one cm cubes. Amy needs 216 one cm cubes. Progression 1
